name: Ching Lee Holdings Limited
summary: Ching Lee Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of construction, consultancy, and project management services in Hong Kong. The company undertakes substructure building works; superstructure building works; and repair, maintenance, alteration, and addition works. It is also involved in property holding activities. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Jordan, Hong Kong. Ching Lee Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of JT Glory Limited.
